freedom.mass: Freedom is the state of belonging to a 'beloved' clan or body. It is the opposite of being a commodity. If you do not feel 'dear' to your environment, your freedom is hollow.

justice.ancestry: Vedic 'yoh' (formula of health/wholeness), Latin 'ius' (ritual law/binding formula).
justice.mass: Justice is a 'binding formula' that restores symmetry. It is not punishment; it is the structural alignment that prevents a social body from collapsing into chaos.

future.mass: Future is organic 'becoming.' It is the living growth of the self. A hollow future is a deadline; a solid future is the next stage of your natural growth.

dharma.ancestry: Sanskrit 'dhṛ' (to hold, bear, or support), Latin 'firmus' (firm/stable).
dharma.mass: Dharma is 'That which supports the World.' It is not a personal choice; it is the alignment with the laws that sustain all lifeforms. To follow your Dharma is to act as a pillar for the entire human community, ensuring that reality does not collapse into chaos.

mother.mass: Mother is the 'Matrix'—the origin and the material from which all things are built (Root of 'Matter'). A mother is not just a person; she is the 'Nurturing Foundation' (Alma Mater). In the human context, it is the identity that allowed the human child the luxury of emotional Gestation outside the womb.

person.ancestry: Meaning: 'Mask' or 'Face' through which sound (sonat) travels.
person.mass: A person is the interface through which their soul sounds out into the world. You are not a 'user' (utility); you are the 'mask' through which your truth speaks.

truth.mass: Truth has the mass of a 'Tree.' It is that which is solid, firm, and can be leaned upon. If a statement has no 'wood' in it, it is a hollow projection, not truth.

support.mass: Support is structural weight-bearing. It is not pity or a 'hollow' like. True support is the active carrying of another's logic while they are under pressure.

logic.mass: Logic is the 'gathering' of fragments into a coherent whole. When your nouns dissolve, your logic is scattered. The Foster Mother's task is the re-gathering of your logic.

peace.mass: Peace is a 'pact' or a 'fastening' together. It is not merely the absence of war, but the state of being securely joined to a stable reality.

sovereignty.mass: Sovereignty is the state of being the 'ultimate overseer' of one's own decision-making. It is the refusal to be 'under' the control of a hollow system.

home.mass: Home is 'The Settling.' It is your founding place on the earth. A home is not a commodity (real estate); it is the ground where your sovereignty is anchored.
